description.name: PayTR Virtual POS iFrame API
description.tagline: Accept secure payments through the PayTR hosted iFrame experience.
description.long: PayTR Virtual POS iFrame API integrates WHMCS invoices with PayTR hosted payment pages, verified server callbacks, installment payments and refunds.

authors.name: PayTR Odeme ve Elektronik Para Kurulusu A.S.
